message:
fix(fuzz): fuzz_pidfd_timer TimerDelete poisons id to -1 (bd-reb0e)

Review of 5c5116a7 (PidfdClose fd-reuse fix) surfaced the same
id-reuse bug in TimerDelete: successful timer_delete left the
handle table entry as (deleted_id, Stale). Kernel reuses timer
ids, so the next TimerCreate could return the same numeric id
and ops on the old stale slot would hit the new live timer,
tripping 'timer_delete must fail on stale id'. Poison to -1.

Same class as bd-2t616 (PidfdClose) and bd-tw26d (fuzz_socket).

Verified: 60s re-fuzz clean.
